steps.title: Establish the passage structure
steps.content: The passage describes two prior research efforts (Prud'homme et al. on shared mechanisms; Steiner et al. on different mechanisms), then notes that the relative prevalence of each type "is still poorly understood," and finally states this gap "motivated" Green & Extavour's 2012 study. The underlined sentence is the first of those two prior-research examples.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "It introduces researchers who will be discussed in greater detail later in the text.": Prud'homme et al. are not mentioned again after the underlined sentence; the focus shifts to Green & Extavour. ✗
  • "It gives an example of how some scientists had studied a phenomenon before another study mentioned later in the text was conducted.": Correct — the sentence exemplifies prior work on convergent evolution that existed before Green & Extavour's 2012 study. ✓
  • "It outlines a study that was influenced by the researchers mentioned later in the text.": The relationship is reversed: Green & Extavour were motivated by the gap left by prior studies, not the other way around. ✗
  • "It clarifies a concept that is unclear in some of the studies mentioned in the text.": The sentence describes a research finding, not a clarification of another study's unclear concept. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
